text.title: Bun Native APIs: File I/O, Env, Testing, Bundling
text.summary: Bun.file/Bun.write for file operations, type-safe Bun.env wrapper, bun:test patterns, and build commands.

rule.statement: Use Bun.file() to read and Bun.write() to write; stream large files to avoid loading them fully into memory.
rule.rationale: Bun's file APIs use native I/O paths that outperform fs/promises; the streaming API prevents OOM on large files.

rule.statement: Wrap Bun.env in a validated accessor function that throws on missing required vars at startup, not at first use.
rule.rationale: Failing at startup with a clear message is better than a cryptic TypeError later in a request handler when the var is first accessed.

rule.statement: Import describe, it, expect, mock from bun:test; replace jest.fn() with mock().
rule.rationale: bun:test is Jest-compatible in API but runs 10-100x faster due to native execution; no additional packages needed.

section.title: Build Commands
section.p: Build for Bun: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun --minify
Build for Node.js: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --minify
